baseline.old_skill_run_id: v0 stub (SKILL.md prose only, no scanner)

migration_correctness.definition: (every hard Skyline-only feature present is flagged action=rewrite) AND (zero false rewrite on a clean-workaround program).
migration_correctness.oracle: evals/run_all.mjs cases scan_worklet_rewrite / scan_custom_route_rewrite / scan_skyline_components_each / scan_mixed_both_correct (recall) + scan_clean_workarounds_keep / scan_false_match_guard (no false rewrite).
migration_correctness.measured: 18/18 deterministic eval cases pass; real-fixture smoke: rewrite==0 on a zero-hard-feature program, mechanical==1, 38 keep, 1 verify.

minimal_diff.definition: files touched + lines changed by the migration on a program; minimal is the success signal.
minimal_diff.oracle: the mechanical flip is ONE app.json edit (+ N page-json edits only where a page-level renderer override exists); keep rows produce zero edits.
minimal_diff.target: as small as the scan's mechanical count; report it.
minimal_diff.measured: real fixture: mechanical==1 (single app.json renderer flip), 0 page overrides → 1 file / ~1 line for the core flip.

activation_precision.definition: precision/recall over assets/eval-cases.json (4 must_activate positives + 4 must_not_activate adjacent negatives) via trigger_eval.mjs --judge cli.

measured.source: engineer stage: 18 deterministic eval cases (evals/run_all.mjs) over 12 synthetic fixtures + a read-only smoke on a real Skyline program
measured.real_fixture_smoke: renderer=skyline; mechanical=1 (app.json:19 flip); keep=38; verify=1 (camera mask); rewrite=0; already_migrated=false
measured.trigger_eval: deferred to the conductor's --judge cli run over assets/eval-cases.json (tokens)
